response.justification: While Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including Java and other object-oriented languages, his profile is heavily skewed toward senior and staff-level roles at major tech companies (Google, Meta) and complex system development. His lack of recent junior-level experience, combined with minimal focus on agile methodologies in insurance IT contexts and insufficient German proficiency, makes him a poor fit for an entry-level Java Developer role in this specific sector.
strengths: Extensive experience with Java and object-oriented programming from roles at Altom Consulting and National Instruments
Strong background in software architecture and development across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated involvement in agile practices (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming) in past roles
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level position with 10+ years of senior/staff experience
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', which does not meet the required 'Strong verbal and written communication in German'
Lacks recent experience in agile digitalization projects for the insurance sector
